description_long: This arcade game cabinet features vibrant comic book artwork from the X-Men franchise, with prominent characters such as Wolverine, Cyclops, Storm, and Nightcrawler displayed on both side panels. The front of the cabinet includes a large, colorful control panel with multiple joysticks and buttons, designed for multiplayer gameplay. Above the screen, a marquee displays the X-Men logo in bold yellow and red letters, set against a purple and blue background. The screen area is framed by a black bezel, and the lower front panel houses a coin slot mechanism. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood with a black finish, showing some wear and scuff marks typical of arcade machines. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, making it a centerpiece in any urban entertainment setting.
description: A classic X-Men arcade game cabinet with vivid comic artwork, a large control panel for multiplayer play, and a prominent marquee. The cabinet is mostly black with colorful graphics and a coin slot on the front.
description_view_0: Left side view showing detailed X-Men comic artwork and the protruding control panel with joysticks and buttons.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, black, slightly worn back panel with no artwork or controls visible.
description_view_2: Right side view featuring more X-Men comic artwork and the control panel, mirroring the left side but with different character arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the screen, marquee with X-Men logo, control panel with multiple controls, and the coin slot area.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a black bezel surrounding the display
attribute_control_panel_layout: Four joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged in a row for multiplayer use, with a purple patterned background and visible player markings
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the X-Men logo in bold yellow and red letters on a purple and blue comic-themed background, matching the side panel artwork
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display colorful X-Men comic artwork with multiple characters, including Wolverine, Cyclops, Storm, and Nightcrawler, set against a blue and purple background
